introduction: Little girl K has an alien friend named Yilisiting whom only she can see, but no one believes her. Facing ridicule from friends and scolding from teachers and parents, she declares war on the whole world. Space energy fills her with magic; the classroom transforms into a battlefield, desks and chairs become trenches. The children who were once adversaries instantly unite because of a smile. Amid flying textbooks, they break through the siege, leave Earth, and set out to find the alien friend.Under the protection of her classmates, K successfully boards a spaceship. When she comes to, she has traveled twenty years into the future..."A new storm has emerged; how can we stand still! Through time and space, with all my might, I will come to your side!" — Excerpt from "Miracle Reappearance" (Theme song of "Ultraman Tiga")Director Statement:This short film is based on a true story from my childhood, when no one believed I had an alien friend. Now that I’ve grown up, I’ve made it into a film to show the world!This is a rock-and-roll, yet playful short film.In the story, children who were once enemies unite with a single smile, joining hands to face the world together.Beyond the film, I believe adults can do the same — even the old folks at the top, the ones who think they have it all figured out.If we’ve forgotten the way we came, maybe it’s time to return to our childhood and look into the eyes of children——to see what we have yet to understand, and what we have lost.
